text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's hometown friends come to an
exhibition race to show their support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's thrilled by the unexpected reunion, but her
friends overhear some inconsiderate remarks from
other audience members.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads to the track, determined to put her
supporters' minds at ease.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dominates the race, pulling off an impressive
victory.
